IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: THE CORPORATION IS ORGANIZED AND OPERATED EXCLUSIVELY AS AN IRC 501(C)(3) CHARITABLE ORGANIZATION TO CONSTRUCT, PROVIDE, SPONSOR, MANAGE, REHABILITATE, AND PRESERVE AFFORDABLE HOUSING AND TO CREATE OPPORTUNITIES FOR ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT.
IRS990.MissionDesc: THE CORPORATION IS ORGANIZED AND OPERATED EXCLUSIVELY AS AN IRC 501(C)(3) CHARITABLE ORGANIZATION TO CONSTRUCT, PROVIDE, SPONSOR, MANAGE, REHABILITATE, AND PRESERVE AFFORDABLE HOUSING AND TO CREATE OPPORTUNITIES FOR ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT.
IRS990.Desc: THE NON-PROFIT CORPORATION PROVIDES SERVICES IN CONNECTION WITH SPONSORSHIP, MANAGEMENT, REHABILITATION, AND PRESERVATION OF AFFORDABLE HOUSING BY ACTING AS A MANAGING GENERAL PARTNER FOR LOW AND MODERATE INCOME PROPERTIES LOCATED IN CALIFORNIA. IT'S INVESTMENTS ALSO INCLUDE CARRYING BELOW MARKET RATE LOANS ON THESE INVESTMENTS. THE ORGANIZATION UTILIZES THIS INCOME TO SERVE MORE THAN 8000 FAMILIES WITH COMPREHENSIVE SERVICES THAT BESIDES THE ABOVE MENTIONED ALSO INCLUDES 1) YOUTH SERVICES I.E. COMPUTER ENRICHMENT AND READING PROGRAMS; 2) ADULT SERVICES I.E. ENGLISH AS A SECOND LANGUAGE; 3) SENIOR SERVICES I.E. HEALTH, FITNESS, AND TRANSPORTATION; AND 4) OTHER I.E. FOOD PROGRAMS AND CRIME PREVENTION.

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: SCHEDULE A, PART III, LINE 12, EXPLANATION OF OTHER INCOME:
Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: OTHER INCOME - 2020 AMOUNT: $ 68. OTHER PROGRAM REVENUE - 2020 AMOUNT: $ 6,203. 2021 AMOUNT: $ 12,231. 2022 AMOUNT: $ 10,587. 2023 AMOUNT: $ 30,332. 2024 AMOUNT: $ 30,023.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: RETURN WILL BE REVIEWED BY BOARD PRIOR TO FILING.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: PACIFIC SOUTHWEST COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION IS CONCERNED WITH CONFLICTS OF INTEREST THAT CREATE ACTUAL OR POTENTIAL JOB-RELATED CONCERNS, ESPECIALLY IN THE AREAS OF CONFIDENTIALITY, CUSTOMER RELATIONS, SAFETY, SECURITY, AND MORALE. IF THERE IS ANY ACTUAL OR POTENTIAL CONFLICT OF INTEREST BETWEEN YOU AND A COMPETITOR, SUPPLIER, DISTRIBUTOR, OR CONTRACTOR TO THE COMPANY, YOU MUST DISCLOSE IT TO YOUR SUPERVISOR. IF AN ACTUAL OR POTENTIAL CONFLICT OF INTEREST IS DETERMINED TO EXIST, THE COMPANY WILL TAKE SUCH STEPS AS IT DEEMS NECESSARY TO REDUCE OR ELIMINATE THIS CONFLICT.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15A
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE BOARD REVIEWS COMPENSATION POLICIES OF EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR AND DETERMINES RAISES, BONUSES, AND OTHER COMPENSATION AWARDS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
